zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Tucker於1608年出生在英國武斯特斯爾德洛特維其 聖 彼得時，她的父親Daniel Tucker33歲，母親Elizabeth Mansfield29歲。她於1626年12月18日與Arthur Allen在英國結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1686年4月27日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州素利巴根也斯 卡素享年78歲，埋葬在美國維吉尼亞州。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Tucker于1608年出生在英国武斯特斯爾德洛特維其 聖 彼得时，她的父亲Daniel Tucker33岁，母亲Elizabeth Mansfield29岁。她于1626年12月18日与Arthur Allen在英国结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1686年4月27日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州素利巴根也斯 卡素享年78岁，埋葬在美国弗吉尼亚州。

nameMeanings.name: Tucker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southwestern): occupational name from Middle English tuker(e), toker(e) ‘tucker, fuller’, a derivative of tuken ‘to torment, beat’ (Old English tūcian), for someone who fulled and finished cloth. This name for the occupation was characteristic of the West Country. Compare Fuller and Walker and see also Tuckerman .
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Tuachair ‘descendant of Tuachar’, a personal name composed of the elements tuath ‘people’ + car ‘dear, beloved’.
Americanized form of Jewish Tocker or Toker (see Tokarz ).

variants.name: Tooker
meanings: English (Devon) and Irish: variant of   Tucker  .

variants.name: Tuckerman
meanings: English: from Middle English tuker(e), toker(e) ‘tucker, fuller’ (see Tucker 1) + -man, either for a tucker, or for his servant or assistant.

variants.name: Fuller
meanings: English: occupational name for a dresser of cloth, from Middle English fuller ‘fuller of cloth’ (partly from Old English fullere, partly from Old French fouleor, foleur, Latin fullo). Raw cloth had to be fulled, i.e. scoured, cleansed, and thickened by beating or trampling it in water, a process also known as walking or tucking, hence the surnames Walker and Tucker alongside Fuller. These three terms and surnames are characteristic of different parts of England. In general, in Middle English, Fuller is southern and eastern, while Walker belongs to the west and north and Tucker is southwestern. Compare Fullen .
English: variant of Fullard with loss of -d.
German (Füller): occupational name for a person whose work involved filling, such as a dauber, or a nickname for a gourmand or glutton. Compare Filler .

variants.name: Swinger
meanings: English: occupational name, perhaps for a fuller, who finished cloth by beating it and stretching it on tenters. Middle English swyngere is not independently recorded but it appears to be an agent derivative of Middle English swingen ‘to beat, strike, punish, afflict (something)’. Compare the synonymous Tucker , an agent derivative of Middle English tuken ‘to torment, beat’. The earliest bearers of the name Swinger were wealthy townsmen.
In some instances probably an Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) Schwinger , or German Zwinger, a nickname from Middle High German zwinger ‘oppressor’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Tucker was born in 1608, in Droitwich St Peter, Worcestershire, England, her father, Daniel Tucker, was 33 and her mother, Elizabeth Mansfield, was 29. She married Arthur Allen on 18 December 1626, in England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 27 April 1686, in Bacon's Castle, Surry, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 78, and was buried in Virginia, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Tucker est née en 1608, à Droitwich St Peter, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Daniel Tucker, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Mansfield, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Arthur Allen le 18 décembre 1626, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 27 avril 1686, à Bacon's Castle, Surry, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterrée à Virginie, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Tucker 1608 in Droitwich St Peter, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Daniel Tucker 33 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Mansfield 29. Sie hat am 18. Dezember 1626 in England Arthur Allen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 27. April 1686 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Bacon's Castle, Surry, Virginia, British Colonial America und wurde in Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Tucker è nata il nel 1608 nel Droitwich St Peter, Worcestershire, England, sua padre, Daniel Tucker, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Mansfield, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Arthur Allen il 18 dicembre 1626, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 27 aprile 1686, nel Bacon's Castle, Surry, Virginia, British Colonial America, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolta a Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Tuckerが1608年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアドロイトウィチ スト ペターで生まれた時，父Daniel Tuckerは33歳，母Elizabeth Mansfieldは29歳であった。1626年12月18日にイギリスでArthur Allenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1686年4月27日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州スリーバコン'ス カストルで78歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国バージニア州にて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Tucker(이)가 1608년 영국 워스스터실르 드로이트위치 스트 피터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Daniel Tucker(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Mansfield(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1626년 12월 18일 영국에서 Arthur Allen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1686년 4월 27일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 수리 바콘'스 카스틀에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 버지니아 주에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Tucker nasceu em 1608, em Droitwich St Peter, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Daniel Tucker, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Mansfield, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Arthur Allen em 18 de dezembro de 1626, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 27 de abril de 1686, em Bacon's Castle, Surry, Virginia, British Colonial America, com 78 anos, e foi sepultada em Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Tucker родилась в 1608 г. в местности дроитвич ст питир, ворсестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Daniel Tucker было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Mansfield, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Arthur Allen 18 декабря 1626 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 27 апреля 1686 г. в местности бакон'с кастл, сурри, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 78 лет и была похоронена в местности Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Tucker nació en 1608, en Droitwich St Peter, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Daniel Tucker, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Mansfield, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Arthur Allen el 18 de diciembre de 1626, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 27 de abril de 1686, en Bacon's Castle, Surry, Virginia, British Colonial America, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultada en Virginia, Estados Unidos.
